title:	⚠️ [重要公告] 插件正式改名为 Voyager — Chrome Web Store 暂时不可用
state:	OPEN
author:	Nagi-ovo (Jesse Zhang)
labels:	
comments:	10
assignees:	
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	454
--
## 情况说明

由于商标版权问题，本插件已正式从 **Gemini Voyager** 改名为 **Voyager**。

更名申请已提交至 Chrome Web Store，但由于谷歌插件商店审核速度极慢，七天内未完成名称更新审核，目前 **Chrome Web Store 版本暂时无法使用**。

详情请见开发者的 X（Twitter）说明帖：👉 https://x.com/Nag1ovo/status/2031561180213313944

---

## 临时解决方案 / Temporary Workarounds

> 💡 **已安装过插件的用户**：插件可能因商店下架被自动禁用。前往 `chrome://extensions` 找到 Gemini Voyager，手动开启开关即可暂时恢复使用，无需重新安装。

**🦊 Firefox 用户（不受影响）：**
Firefox Add-ons 正常可用 → https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/gemini-voyager/

**🔵 Edge 用户（不受影响）：**
Microsoft Edge Add-ons 正常可用 → https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/gemini-voyager/gibmkggjijalcjinbdhcpklodjkhhlne

**🔧 Chrome / Brave / Opera 用户 — 手动安装：**
1. 前往 [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager/releases) 下载最新 `.zip`
2. 解压后打开 `chrome://extensions`
3. 开启**开发者模式**，点击**加载已解压的扩展程序**

🍎 **Safari 用户（不受影响）：**
前往 [Releases](https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager/releases) 下载最新 `.dmg`

---

审核通过后会立即更新此 Issue。感谢大家的耐心等待！❤️

---

## Details (English)

This extension has been officially renamed from **Gemini Voyager** to **Voyager** due to trademark and copyright concerns.

The name update was submitted to the Chrome Web Store, but due to the extremely slow review process, it was not approved within 7 days — the **Chrome Web Store listing is temporarily unavailable**.

See the developer's explanation: 👉 https://x.com/Nag1ovo/status/2031561180213313944

> 💡 **Already installed?** Your extension may have been automatically disabled due to the store listing being removed. Go to `chrome://extensions`, find Gemini Voyager, and toggle it back on to restore functionality — no reinstall needed.

Use **Firefox Add-ons**, **Microsoft Edge Add-ons**, or **manual installation** in the meantime. This issue will be updated once the review is approved.

> [!IMPORTANT] > **Name Change Notice**: Due to trademark and copyright concerns, this extension has been officially renamed to **Voyager**. However, due to the Chrome Web Store's extremely slow review process, the name change was not approved within 7 days — it is temporarily unavailable on the Chrome Web Store under the new name. > [!NOTE] > If Voyager helps you, feel free to share it on X, Reddit, YouTube, Threads, etc. Every share helps more people discover the project and improve the Gemini experience. It's not just a tool; it's a companion that helps you keep your AI conversations organized, accessible, and productive. Whether you're a researcher juggling dozens of threads, a developer saving code snippets, or just someone who loves order, Voyager is designed for you.
